revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> == Usage == This template is a typing aid that creates a link to the MediaWiki source file {{sanitizer.php}}.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, please; interwikis to Wikidata. --------------------------------------------------------------------> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> == Usage == This template is a typing aid that creates a link to the MediaWiki source file {{sanitizer.php}}.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, please; interwikis to Wikidata. --------------------------------------------------------------------> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> == Usage == This template is a typing aid that creates a link to the MediaWiki source file {{sanitizer.php}}.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, please; interwikis to Wikidata. --------------------------------------------------------------------> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> == Usage == This template is a typing aid that creates a link to the MediaWiki source file {{sanitizer.php}}.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, please; interwikis to Wikidata. --------------------------------------------------------------------> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!------------------------------------------------------------------- Place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis to Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]). --------------------------------------------------------------------> == Usage == This template is a typing aid that creates a link to the MediaWiki source file {{sanitizer.php}}.
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!------------------------------------------------------------------- Categories below here, please; interwikis to Wikidata. -------------------------------------------------------------------->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:MediaWiki source code templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
